title: Milestone
description: A time-boxed group of tasks representing a coherent phase of game development.

name.description: Short human-readable name for this milestone.

goal.description: One sentence describing what a player can do when this milestone is complete that they could not do before.

task_ids.description: Ordered list of task IDs included in this milestone. Order reflects recommended execution sequence.

estimated_nights.description: Estimated number of nightly build cycles needed to complete all tasks in this milestone.

actual_nights.description: Actual nights taken. Filled in by Planner when milestone is marked complete.

success_criteria.description: List of 2-5 testable statements defining when this milestone is done.

critical_path.description: True if this milestone is on the critical path — i.e. it must be complete before the next milestone can begin.

started_at.description: Date when the first task in this milestone was started. ISO 8601 date.

completed_at.description: Date when all tasks in this milestone reached done status. ISO 8601 date.

notes.description: Optional notes from Architect or Planner about this milestone (e.g. reasons for deferral, scope changes).
